prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-425SHTTNSB-425 Product Type: TOOLS Brand (from catalog): Universal Tool Existing Title: Universal Tool 4.25 Sharp Heat Treated Thread Nipper Shear Blades Description: The Universal Tool 4.25 inch Thread Nipper is a great addition to any tool box. These scissors feature extremely sharp pointed blades, ideal for sewing, cutting thick paracord, small foliage and other materials that require precision.

Each nipper is constructed of high quality alloy steel, and the blades are heat treated. These shears will come in handy around the house, in the shop, in your garden or hobby project. Search Terms: sewing fabric tailor scissors shears Features: - High Quality Alloy Steel - Heat Treated Blades - Extremely Sharp Shears with Stopper - Great for Hobbies, Crafts, Precision Projects, Cutting Thick Cord, Trimming Foliage & More - Length: 41/4 inch | 10.795 cm === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Universal Tool 4.25" Sharp Heat Treated Thread Nipper

openai.item_name: Universal Tool 4.25 in Thread Nipper Shears

anthropic.title_differentiation: High Quality Alloy Steel, Heat Treated Blades, Extremely Sharp, Precision Cutting, Sewing And Crafts

openai.title_differentiation: Heat Treated Alloy Steel Blades, Extremely Sharp Precision Tips, Stopper, Sewing, Thick Cord, Foliage, Crafts
